title: HR Operations Hub — the PowerPoint, embedded
excerpt: The same deck shown a second way: the original PowerPoint embedded straight into the page with Microsoft's Office viewer — no conversion at all. The simplest route for getting any slide deck online.

title: Expat Employee Guide — an interactive slide deck
excerpt: A PowerPoint onboarding guide for employees relocating to Finland, rebuilt as a slideshow that runs right in your browser. Use the arrow keys or swipe — press F for full screen.

title: Turn your slides into a website — a beginner's guide to Reveal.js
excerpt: No coding needed. A plain-English walkthrough of how the deck above was made — and a copy-paste starter so you can turn any HR material into a shareable web presentation.

title: How the HR dashboard works — explained for absolute beginners
excerpt: No coding experience needed — a plain-English tour of how the interactive HR dashboard is built, from the list of numbers to the clickable charts.
